assertions.description: CHECK_NEEDS_FIX: The operacake board has an I2C GPIO expander (U4/PCA9557) on the SCL/SDA bus. Pull-up resistors R7 and R8 (1.8k each) are present in the schematic but marked DNP (Do Not Populate) — operacake relies on the host HackRF board to supply I2C pull-ups. The analyzer correctly identifies has_pullup=false for both SCL and SDA since DNP components are excluded from analysis. The DNP count of 41 components is also correctly reported in statistics.
